title: rapanea neurophylla
intro: Rapanea neurophylla, also known as the Mountain Pepper, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to Australia and New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rapanea neurophylla include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
